历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1828, significantly shifted back to 3678 in 2024, and recovered to 2918 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2918. The science enrollment plan in this province was 26 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 31 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend; the 2026 plan increases to 46, an expansion of about 48% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the main ranking of Soft Science in 2026 is about 57th, with stable rankings in the 47-57 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the university has no significant negative public opinion events in reputation monitoring; Douyin heat total ranking is 91st, rated as "average", with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no significant heat fluctuations; no record of admission gaps; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, a total of 3 A-class disciplines; among them, Applied Economics and Business Administration are the core advantages of the university, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of finance/finance/economics majors is "differentiated wait-and-see" (2026), law is "differentiated wait-and-see" (63.54), business administration is "clearly discouraged" (42.96); the total number of candidates in this province in 2026 is about 238,000, estimated by historical proportion to be about 163,000 science candidates, a significant increase from 53,000 science candidates in 2025, with significantly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 2918 in 2025, a significant expansion of about 48% in the science plan in 2026, and a substantial increase in the number of science candidates in this province, the supply-demand elasticity calculation shows that the ranking should move up to about 3765; considering the partial mitigation of competition due to expansion and the superimposed effect of a surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3815, with a range of 3315-4315.

- Finance Majors
- Law Majors
- Economics Majors
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Business Administration Majors
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Major Enrollment)
- Actuarial Science
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 3315-4315, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Business Administration Majors and Customs Management as main directions, Tier 1 Finance Majors and Economics Majors can be attempted, and Tier 3 Data Science and Big Data Technology and Actuarial Science as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (close to 3315), focus on attempting Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 420, rising to 369 in 2024, then falling back to 433 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 369-433 range, showing overall stability; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 433. Data for 2021-2022 is missing. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 26 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 27 in 2025, remaining basically stable; the 2026 plan increases to 34, an expansion of about 26% compared to 2025, which is significant and exerts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable position in the 47-57 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. No significant negative public opinion incidents have been detected in reputation monitoring. It ranks 91st in overall Douyin popularity, rated as "average," with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No record of enrollment gaps. It has three A-level disciplines: Applied Economics (A), Business Administration (A), and Foreign Languages and Literature (A-); among them, Foreign Languages and Literature (A-) is directly related to liberal arts enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of finance/economics/finance majors is "differentiated wait-and-see" (2026), law is "differentiated wait-and-see" (63.54), and foreign languages and literature is "general wait-and-see" (52.15). The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 238,000, with an estimated 75,000 liberal arts students based on historical proportions, a significant increase from the 24,000 liberal arts students in 2025, leading to sharply intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 433 in 2025, the approximately 26% expansion of liberal arts enrollment in 2026, and the expected substantial increase in the number of liberal arts examinees in the province, supply-demand elasticity calculations indicate that the ranking should move up to approximately 500. Taking into account the partial mitigation of competition due to expansion and the superimposed effect of the surge in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 515, with a range of 422-608.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (close to 422), it is advisable to focus on reaching for top-tier flagship majors.
